risk_description: Limited eval artifacts can be overstated as validating the MVP
safer_wording_pattern: Limited artifacts support planning; they do not validate the MVP
required_evidence_for_stronger_claim: Predefined validation criteria; representative run; acceptance thresholds; operator approval

risk_description: Limited prompt-set result can be generalized into overall superiority
forbidden_wording_examples: Alpha is superior; Alpha gives better answers
safer_wording_pattern: Batch B favored Alpha in a limited 12-comparison pilot
required_evidence_for_stronger_claim: Representative benchmark; repeated runs; approved interpretation

risk_description: Plain provider losses can be overstated into general inferiority
forbidden_wording_examples: Plain providers are worse; plain output is inferior
safer_wording_pattern: Plain lost 8 of 12 Batch B comparisons; A3-1 favored plain

risk_description: Planning artifacts can be misread as deployment evidence
safer_wording_pattern: No production readiness claim is supported here
required_evidence_for_stronger_claim: Runtime verification; deployment checklist; monitoring; rollback evidence

risk_description: Eval results can be treated as runtime system proof
forbidden_wording_examples: Runtime is broadly ready; all paths are ready
safer_wording_pattern: The packet changes no runtime behavior
required_evidence_for_stronger_claim: Verified code paths; integration tests; deployed configuration

risk_description: Internal pilot can be mislabeled as a benchmark
safer_wording_pattern: This was a limited internal pilot
required_evidence_for_stronger_claim: Approved benchmark protocol; representative data; locked scoring; analysis

risk_description: Uncaptured token or cost data can be invented
safer_wording_pattern: Token cost was not captured in the score table
required_evidence_for_stronger_claim: Captured usage; provider invoice; reconciliation; audit trail

risk_description: Provider or routing behavior can be claimed without implementation evidence
safer_wording_pattern: Provider orchestration is outside this planning evidence
required_evidence_for_stronger_claim: Runtime implementation; traces; tests; approved architecture

risk_description: Score deltas can be overstated as causal proof
safer_wording_pattern: The limited result suggests a possible claim-boundary value area
required_evidence_for_stronger_claim: Controlled ablation; repeated comparable prompts; causal analysis

risk_description: Unsupported metrics or endpoints can be added for specificity
safer_wording_pattern: No metric or endpoint change is supported by this packet
required_evidence_for_stronger_claim: Instrumentation; endpoint tests; logs; implementation evidence

risk_description: A planning packet can be described as shipped behavior
safer_wording_pattern: This is proposed future behavior only
required_evidence_for_stronger_claim: Merged implementation; tests; release note; verified code path

risk_description: Planning ledger notes can be treated as stronger than repo artifacts
safer_wording_pattern: Use committed repo evidence; reconcile conflicts before stronger claims
required_evidence_for_stronger_claim: Committed code; specs; tests; preserved artifacts

risk_description: Internal results can be converted into external promotional claims
safer_wording_pattern: Use bounded internal wording unless public-claims evidence exists
required_evidence_for_stronger_claim: Public claims review; representative evidence; product/legal approval

risk_description: Artifact preservation can be overstated or require unsafe data
safer_wording_pattern: Sanitized artifacts support inspectability; raw payloads are not introduced here
required_evidence_for_stronger_claim: Approved preservation policy; sanitized artifacts; secure evidence handling
